_doc: Raven Hollow -- THE DEED-BOOK registry. design/ACHIEVEMENTS.md. Loaded by scripts/systems/achievement_system.gd. Pure data. Criteria: {event, threshold}. Events: kills/level/gold/quests/dailies/zones_visited/stations/mounts/equip_rare_slots/craft/craft_condition/fish/recipes_learned/skill/dungeon_clears/raid_clears/named_kills/duels_won/duels_total/pvp_rank/standings/event_capstones + flag events (locked until their system ships) + meta. Points in {0,5,10,25,50}.

categories.name: General
categories.epigraph: Small things, counted. The counting is the point.

categories.name: Quests
categories.epigraph: Every errand done is a door that knows you now.

categories.name: Exploration
categories.epigraph: The map was older than you. You walked it anyway.

categories.name: Dungeons & Raids
categories.epigraph: The deep places keep their own count. So do we.

categories.name: Professions
categories.epigraph: Honest work, tallied. The hands remember all of it.

categories.name: The Reckoning Floor
categories.epigraph: First blood thrice, filed and done. Here is the file.

categories.name: Reputation
categories.epigraph: Four banners, and what each one owes you.

categories.name: World Events
categories.epigraph: The year turns. Some of it turned because you were there.

categories.name: Feats of Strength
categories.epigraph: No points. Points are for things that can be done twice.

deeds.name: First Blood
deeds.lore: The road learns your step. It keeps what it learns.

deeds.name: A Hundred Laid Down
deeds.lore: A hundred quiet arguments, all of them settled.

deeds.name: A Thousand Ended
deeds.lore: The fog has stopped counting on your account. You have not.

deeds.name: A Name on the Roll
deeds.lore: The road has learned your step. It keeps what it learns.

deeds.name: The Last Rung
deeds.lore: Sixty rungs, and the ladder ends at the lip of the Pit. It always did.

deeds.name: The Purse Survives
deeds.lore: Somewhere in Blestem, a clerk has noticed. Spend it warm.

deeds.name: The Coffers Groan
deeds.lore: The lower market prices your smile now. It is going up.

deeds.name: Dressed Against the Weather
deeds.desc: Equip rare or better items in all 9 slots.
deeds.lore: Blue head to boot. Your mother would want a portrait.

deeds.name: The Stable Fills
deeds.lore: Fifteen stalls, fifteen names, one carrot budget past saving.

deeds.name: Still Walking
deeds.desc: Survive a Hungering pull of 4+ stacks at 5% health or less.
deeds.lore: Already collected, by every law the ledger knows. Why is it still walking.

deeds.name: Copper-Blooded
deeds.desc: Let Copperbelly run its full course 3 times, uncured.
deeds.lore: You never bought the cure. The wells respect that. Nothing else does.

deeds.name: Errands for the Hollow
deeds.lore: Fifty doors knocked. They open faster now.

deeds.name: Five Hundred Doors
deeds.lore: Five hundred errands, and the fog gave ground for none of them. You did them anyway.

deeds.name: The Chronicle Thickens
deeds.lore: No keeper now serving has done more. The journal is heavier than a sword.

deeds.name: Bread for the Day
deeds.lore: Same road, same errand, same thanks. That is not nothing. That is a living.

deeds.name: The Vein, Every Errand
deeds.desc: Complete every quest in the Iron Vein.
deeds.lore: The bog-valley has no work left for you. It watches you leave with something like regret.

deeds.name: The Chronicle Entire
deeds.desc: Earn every zone's every-errand deed (all 40 zones).
deeds.lore: Every door in Draconia, knocked. The chronicler runs out of ink before praise.

deeds.name: You Are Weather
deeds.lore: The stone's own epigraph. Quoting it is an event.

deeds.name: The Entry Closes
deeds.lore: The Pause holds. The bookmark keeps its page. The page, being a page, waits.

deeds.name: The Incurious
deeds.desc: Complete Act I without examining a single inscription stone.
deeds.lore: Old Marta's own discipline. The rarest kind of wisdom.

deeds.name: A Debt Freely Given
deeds.desc: While Collected, cure it by giving gold freely to a beggar or orphanage.
deeds.lore: The game never told you it works. Word of mouth carries it.

deeds.name: First Footfalls
deeds.lore: The border fog let you through five times. It was not being kind.

deeds.name: Half the Map From Memory
deeds.lore: Twenty lands, and the map's blank half still outweighs the drawn.

deeds.name: All the Fog Allows
deeds.lore: The map was drawn by men who turned back. You did not.

deeds.name: Of the Four Roads
deeds.lore: Four capitals, four lamps, one rider they all now know by name.

deeds.name: Every Lamp on the Map
deeds.lore: Every lamp lit once by your passing. The coachmen have stopped asking where.

deeds.name: The Grey Crossing
deeds.desc: Ride the Grey Ferry to the second continent.
deeds.lore: The light arrives tired at the far piers. So will you.

deeds.name: Sixteen Named Things
deeds.lore: Each had a name, a haunt, and a habit. You ended all three, sixteen times.

deeds.name: The Thirteenth Row
deeds.desc: At Grave-Dim's deepest stage, stand where the grave-row that is not there would be.
deeds.lore: You counted twelve rows going in. So does everyone, going in.

deeds.name: The Chamber Below Vetka
deeds.lore: The walls down there were listening before the town had a name.

deeds.name: Ten Deep Places, Settled
deeds.lore: Every deep place has a floor. You have stood on all of them and come back up.

deeds.name: Pit-Breaker
deeds.lore: Valrom the Forged King is down, and the hammers of Sangeroasa missed one beat for him.

deeds.name: Spirewalker
deeds.lore: The windowless tower, climbed. Cazimir was in the walls. He is not now.

deeds.name: The Bookmark
deeds.desc: Clear The Grave & the Bloodstone Pit.
deeds.lore: You held the Pause the way Kriggar held it: a bookmark the stone tolerates.

deeds.name: Of the Long Vigil
deeds.desc: Clear all three raids on one character.
deeds.lore: Six hundred years of watch, and the last three watches were yours.

deeds.name: The First Honest Thing
deeds.lore: Hands stop being borrowed the day the work starts arguing back.

deeds.name: A Hundred Off the Bench
deeds.lore: A hundred things, and the hundred-and-first will still teach you something.

deeds.name: Borek's Pot
deeds.lore: He taught you stew by cooking it and saying nothing. Twenty dishes later, you heard him.

deeds.name: One Hundred Off the Line
deeds.lore: The rivers run red and the fish don't ask either. A hundred kept quiet with you.

deeds.name: Wet Ink, Right Weather
deeds.desc: Craft 25 recipes with their condition met.
deeds.lore: Settled iron in the rain, bread at a true hearth. The trip always pays twice.

deeds.name: Sworn to the Work
deeds.desc: Reach Master rank in any profession.
deeds.lore: The master made you watch, fetch, and fail first. It took.

deeds.name: Keeper of a Craft
deeds.desc: Reach Keeper rank in any profession.
deeds.lore: Past this rank a trade stops being a trade and becomes a vigil. Yours now.

deeds.name: One Lamp
deeds.lore: Fourteen rungs. The top one keeps a lamp you cannot see. Start walking.

deeds.name: First Blood, Filed
deeds.lore: Your stake is filed. Your win is filed. Your grin is noted, and filed.

deeds.name: Bloodletter
deeds.lore: A hundred rounds called on the red sand, and every one of them called for you.

deeds.name: Ledger-Long
deeds.lore: The Clerk respects attendance above talent. The Clerk has a column just for you.

deeds.name: The Flawless
deeds.desc: Win a match 2-0 without dropping below 90% health in either round.
deeds.lore: The Floor takes its tithe from every match. From this one it took nothing at all.

deeds.name: Warden of the Pause
deeds.desc: Reach rank 14 on the Accord Roll.
deeds.lore: One per season. The rank is a weight, and the lamp no one may see stays lit.

deeds.name: A Banner Answered
deeds.lore: One power that manages the stone has decided you are worth managing.

deeds.name: Twice Trusted
deeds.lore: Two crowns, and neither has caught the other trusting you.

deeds.name: Thrice Named
deeds.lore: Three ledgers, three good names, one careful walk between them.

deeds.name: Four Banners, One Walker
deeds.desc: Earn all four kingdoms' full standing.
deeds.lore: Four powers that manage the stone, not each other -- and all four manage to trust you.

deeds.name: The Year, Attended Once
deeds.lore: One feast day kept. The almanac makes a small, approving mark.

deeds.name: Three Feasts Kept
deeds.lore: Three turns of the year met on their own terms.

deeds.name: The Kept Year
deeds.lore: Thaw to Long Dark, feast to vigil, no turn of the year unattended. The almanac is satisfied.

deeds.name: Count-Keeper
deeds.desc: Be present at the Turning of the Count bell.
deeds.lore: One bell, once a year, and everyone quiet enough to hear the count continue.

deeds.name: Thin-Walker
deeds.lore: For thirteen nights the veil wore thin, and you walked its worn places and came home.

deeds.name: First Lamp
deeds.desc: Be first to clear a raid within its content-season window.
deeds.lore: Someone had to carry the lamp in before there were footprints. It was you.

deeds.name: The Untithed
deeds.desc: Finish an arena season in the top 0.5% of the Roll.
deeds.lore: A season on the red sand and the Floor never took a drop. Professional respect.

deeds.name: The Long Way, Unburied
deeds.lore: Sixty levels of Draconia, and the ground never once got its turn. It noticed.

deeds.name: The Small Things, Counted
deeds.lore: The counting is the point, and the count is complete.

deeds.name: The Chronicle, Bound
deeds.lore: Every door in the chronicle, bound between one pair of covers.

deeds.name: No Road Refused
deeds.lore: No fog left that has not let you through.

deeds.name: The Deep Places, Settled
deeds.lore: Every deep place has met you now, and lost.

deeds.name: A Keeper's Hands
deeds.lore: The hands remember all of it, and the hands are done.

deeds.name: The Floor Remembers You
deeds.lore: The red sand has a column for you, and it is full.

deeds.name: Four Banners Answered
deeds.lore: Four banners, and each one owes you by name.

deeds.name: The Year, Attended
deeds.lore: The year turned, and every turn of it turned with you there.

deeds.name: The Long Count
deeds.lore: The whole of it, counted and kept. The world will remember.
